lost_token.title: Recover the Lost Token
lost_token.summary: Play Cabinet 07 and bring the Lost Token back to Mira.
lost_token.details: Mira says Cabinet 07 has the Lost Token. Recover it, then return to the ticket counter.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: You brought it back.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: That token used to be just a prize.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: Then it became proof that part of you could still return.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: It remembered you before you did.

truth_filter.title: Truth Filter
truth_filter.summary: Find Mr. Byte in Cabinet Row and open the Truth Filter.
truth_filter.details: The Lost Token woke something. Now the arcade has to decide which memories are true. Mr. Byte can open the Truth Filter in Cabinet Row.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Byte
completion_dialogue.text: Truth Filter passed.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Byte
completion_dialogue.text: Contradictions remain.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Byte
completion_dialogue.text: That means the memory is alive enough to argue.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Byte
completion_dialogue.text: Record conflict reduced. Identity conflict remains.

circuit_soda.title: Route the Signal
circuit_soda.summary: Help Vendo stabilize the memory signal.
circuit_soda.details: The Truth Filter recovered a second fragment, but the signal is still misrouted. Vendo says the arcade can move a memory through the wrong machine and still recognize the flavor.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Vendo
completion_dialogue.text: Signal routed.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Vendo
completion_dialogue.text: You successfully became beverage-adjacent data.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Vendo
completion_dialogue.text: I would offer a receipt, but the printer remembers too much.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Vendo
completion_dialogue.text: Your label is still missing, but the machine knows what shelf you go on.

maintenance_sync.title: Maintenance Sync
maintenance_sync.summary: Help Gus stabilize the Staff Door signals.
maintenance_sync.details: Vendo routed the signal, but the Staff Door still needs two unstable signals to line up. Gus says the door is listening for something doubled.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: Door's listening now.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: I do not like doors that listen.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: But if it opens, part of you matched something it lost.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: Door heard both knocks. Yours, and the one you forgot making.

staff_corridor.title: Enter the Staff Corridor
staff_corridor.summary: Follow the Overloaded signal past the Staff Door.
staff_corridor.details: Gus stabilized the door, but the arcade is not ready to show the Staff Room yet. Something is echoing in the corridor.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Memory Echo
completion_dialogue.text: Echo stabilized.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Memory Echo
completion_dialogue.text: The arcade stops arguing with itself.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Memory Echo
completion_dialogue.text: That might be worse.

broken_high_score.title: Broken High Score
broken_high_score.details: The score claims the target is 9999, but the display is broken. The real record may be much smaller and much stranger.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Roxy
completion_dialogue.text: Huh. Your score came back.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Roxy
completion_dialogue.text: That usually does not happen after a reset.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Roxy
completion_dialogue.text: Do not let it go to your head. You still walk like a tutorial.

prize_counter_secret.title: Prize Sort
prize_counter_secret.summary: Arrange three prize labels by memory state.
prize_counter_secret.details: Pip says the prize labels remember an order: Ticket Stub, Lost Token, then Blank Employee Badge.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Pip
completion_dialogue.text: Prizes sorted.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Pip
completion_dialogue.text: Some rewards remember their owner before the owner remembers them.
